description: Domain invariant declarations for FlashIt product

invariants.name: Message delivery guarantee
invariants.description: Messages must be delivered exactly once with no duplicates or loss

invariants.name: Message flow state machine
invariants.description: Messages must follow valid state transitions (created -> queued -> processing -> delivered/failed)

invariants.name: Message content integrity
invariants.description: Message content must not be corrupted during transmission or storage

invariants.name: Message audit trail
invariants.description: All message operations must be logged with sender, recipient, timestamp, and outcome

invariants.name: Message encryption
invariants.description: Sensitive message content must be encrypted at rest and in transit

invariants.name: Message authorization
invariants.description: Message senders and recipients must be authenticated and authorized

invariants.name: Tenant message isolation
invariants.description: Messages must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant leakage

invariants.name: Message retry with backoff
invariants.description: Failed message delivery must retry with exponential backoff
